title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Spencer's Retail Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Spencer's Retail Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Spencer's Retail Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Spencer's Retail Holdings Services:
Spencer's Retail Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail Holdings Services!
